title: dacryodes oblongifolia
intro: Dacryodes oblongifolia, also known as the Canarium tree, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae that is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dacryodes oblongifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
